subject: international_public
note: Seed list — will be enriched by extract_concepts.py from your PDFs

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家在其领土内拥有最高统治权，对外不受任何上位权威约束
concepts.brief_definition_en: The supreme authority of a state within its territory and independence from any external superior authority
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国际法中不允许任何减损的强制性规范，任何违反它的条约均属无效
concepts.brief_definition_en: Peremptory norms of international law from which no derogation is permitted and which invalidate contrary treaties
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家对整个国际社会承担的义务，任何国家均有权主张其履行
concepts.brief_definition_en: Obligations owed to the international community as a whole, enforceable by any state
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 规范条约缔结、解释、效力与终止的国际法规则体系
concepts.brief_definition_en: The body of international law governing the creation, interpretation, validity, and termination of treaties
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 由国家实践与法律确信共同构成的具有约束力的不成文国际法规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: Binding unwritten international law arising from consistent state practice and opinio juris
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国际习惯法形成的主观要素，即国家将某种实践视为法律义务而非礼貌
concepts.brief_definition_en: The subjective element of custom: states' belief that a practice is legally obligatory, not merely courteous
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家实施国际不法行为须承担的赔偿义务及相关法律后果
concepts.brief_definition_en: The legal consequences a state bears when it commits an internationally wrongful act
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 禁止国家干涉他国属于其主权范围内事务的国际法规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: The prohibition on states interfering in matters within another state's domestic jurisdiction
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 各民族自主决定其政治地位与发展道路的权利，是当代国际法核心原则
concepts.brief_definition_en: The right of peoples to determine their own political status and pursue economic, social, and cultural development
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 《联合国宪章》第2条第4款确立的禁止以武力威胁或使用武力侵犯他国领土完整
concepts.brief_definition_en: The UN Charter Article 2(4) prohibition on the threat or use of force against the territorial integrity of states
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 受武力攻击的国家采取必要且相称行动的固有权利
concepts.brief_definition_en: The inherent right of states to use force in response to armed attack, subject to necessity and proportionality
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 以保护平民免受严重人权侵犯为由对他国采取军事行动的争议性实践
concepts.brief_definition_en: The controversial use of military force by states to protect civilians from serious human rights violations in another state
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当国家无力或不愿保护本国平民时，国际社会有集体干预责任
concepts.brief_definition_en: The principle that the international community has a collective responsibility to protect populations when states fail
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 外交人员依条约豁免于接受国司法管辖的国际法制度
concepts.brief_definition_en: The treaty-based immunity of diplomatic agents from the jurisdiction of the receiving state's courts
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家代表其国民在另一国遭受国际不法行为时向该国提出国家责任请求
concepts.brief_definition_en: A state's assertion of claims on behalf of its nationals who have suffered internationally wrongful acts abroad
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 现有国家承认新实体具备国家资格的政治与法律行为
concepts.brief_definition_en: The political and legal act by which existing states acknowledge a new entity as satisfying statehood criteria
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当国家领土控制权发生变化时，条约义务与国家财产的法律传承问题
concepts.brief_definition_en: The transmission of international rights and obligations when territorial sovereignty changes hands between states
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家通过发现、先占、时效、割让、征服等方式获得领土主权的国际法规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: International law rules governing how states acquire territorial sovereignty through discovery, occupation, prescription, cession, or conquest
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 沿海国在其基线以外一定宽度海域内行使主权的国际法制度
concepts.brief_definition_en: The international law regime establishing coastal state sovereignty over a belt of sea adjacent to its coast
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 沿海国在基线以外200海里内对生物和非生物资源享有主权性权利的区域
concepts.brief_definition_en: A 200-nautical-mile zone where the coastal state has sovereign rights over natural resources
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 外国船舶通过领海时，只要不损害沿岸国和平、良序和安全即享有的通过权
concepts.brief_definition_en: The right of foreign ships to pass through the territorial sea provided they do not prejudice peace, order, or security
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.name_en: Individual Criminal Responsibility in International Law
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国际法将种族灭绝、战争罪、危害人类罪等归咎于个人，而非仅归咎于国家
concepts.brief_definition_en: The principle that individuals, not just states, bear criminal responsibility for genocide, war crimes, and crimes against humanity
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 以消灭某一特定群体为目的而实施的特定行为，具有特殊意图要求
concepts.brief_definition_en: Acts committed with intent to destroy in whole or in part a national, ethnic, racial or religious group
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 武装冲突中保护平民与战俘、限制战争手段与方法的国际法规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: Rules of international law protecting persons not taking part in hostilities and limiting means and methods of warfare
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 武装冲突中必须始终区分战斗员与平民、军事目标与民用物体
concepts.brief_definition_en: The IHL requirement to distinguish at all times between combatants and civilians, and military objectives and civilian objects
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.name_zh: 相称性原则（国际人道法）
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 预期对平民的附带损害不得与直接军事利益相比过分
concepts.brief_definition_en: Expected incidental civilian harm must not be excessive in relation to the anticipated direct military advantage
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家对其管辖内个人承担的国际义务，保障基本权利与自由
concepts.brief_definition_en: International obligations of states to respect, protect and fulfil the human rights of individuals within their jurisdiction
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.name_zh: 国际法与国内法的关系
concepts.name_en: Relationship between International and Domestic Law
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 一元论与二元论的争议：国际法与国内法是统一体系还是两个独立体系
concepts.brief_definition_en: The dualist/monist debate on whether international and domestic law form one or two separate legal systems
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 条约以善意按照其条款通常意义并结合上下文及目的和宗旨加以解释
concepts.brief_definition_en: Treaties are interpreted in good faith with the ordinary meaning of terms in context and in light of object and purpose
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家在表示同意受条约约束时，排除或更改条约某些规定效力的单方声明
concepts.brief_definition_en: A unilateral statement purporting to exclude or modify the legal effect of certain provisions of a treaty
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 受害国因他国国际不法行为而暂停履行对该国义务的合法行为
concepts.brief_definition_en: Actions by an injured state suspending obligations toward a responsible state as a response to that state's wrongful act
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 一国不受另一国国内法院管辖的习惯国际法规则及其限制的发展
concepts.brief_definition_en: The customary international law doctrine shielding states from foreign court jurisdiction and its evolving restrictions
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家在其领土内向外国人提供保护，使其免受所在国追诉的实践
concepts.brief_definition_en: A state's protection of a foreign national within its territory against the jurisdiction of the national's home state
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 保护因种族、宗教、政见等原因被迫离开本国的人的国际法律制度
concepts.brief_definition_en: The international legal framework protecting persons forced to flee their country due to persecution
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 禁止将难民遣返至其生命或自由将受到严重威胁的国家的强制性原则
concepts.brief_definition_en: The prohibition on returning refugees or asylum seekers to territories where they face serious threats to life or freedom
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 各专门法律制度（WTO、人权、投资、海洋法）间缺乏系统整合的结构性问题
concepts.brief_definition_en: The structural problem of proliferating self-contained regimes lacking systematic coherence in international law
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 麦克杜格尔等人将国际法视为权威性决策过程，强调政策导向
concepts.brief_definition_en: The policy-oriented approach viewing international law as an authoritative decision-making process shaped by shared values
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 在国际法律秩序中享有权利、承担义务的主体资格，包括国家、国际组织、个人
concepts.brief_definition_en: The capacity to bear rights and duties under international law, held by states, international organizations, and individuals
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家必须善意履行其国际法律义务的一般性国际法原则
concepts.brief_definition_en: The general principle requiring states to perform their international legal obligations in good faith
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 外交保护的前提条件：受害人须穷尽所在国国内救济途径方可提出国际请求
concepts.brief_definition_en: The precondition for diplomatic protection requiring injured aliens to first exhaust available domestic remedies
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 发达国家与发展中国家在应对全球环境问题上负有不同历史责任与能力义务
concepts.brief_definition_en: The principle that states have different obligations for global environmental problems based on historical responsibility and capabilities
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.name_zh: 国际环境法中的预防原则
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 面对科学不确定性时，潜在的严重环境损害不应成为推迟保护措施的理由
concepts.brief_definition_en: Where there are threats of serious environmental damage, lack of scientific certainty shall not be used to postpone measures
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.name_zh: 法律解释中的有效性原则
concepts.name_en: Principle of Effectiveness (Ut Res Magis Valeat)
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 条约解释应优先使条约能够发挥实际效果的解释方式
concepts.brief_definition_en: Treaty provisions should be interpreted to give them practical effect rather than rendering them inutile
concepts.subject: international_public

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国际法院、仲裁庭对争端行使管辖权的根据及其程序性要求
concepts.brief_definition_en: The basis on which international courts and tribunals exercise jurisdiction over disputes and their procedural prerequisites
concepts.subject: international_public
